steps.title: Express a as a percentage of b
steps.content:
The number $a$ is 70% less than $b$, so subtract 70% of $b$ from $b$ itself:
$$a = b - 0.70b = 0.30b$$

steps.title: Find c in terms of b
steps.content:
The number $c$ is 80% greater than $a$, so $c = a + 0.80a = 1.80a$. Substitute $a = 0.30b$:
$$c = 1.80a = 1.80(0.30b) = 0.54b$$
Thus $c$ is 0.54 times $b$. The answer is .54.
